subcodes.first_line: O servant of Truth! Your letter was answered previously. It is strange indeed that it hath not yet arrived. Praise be to God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق مکتوب شما از پیش جواب داده شد عجیب است که تا حال نرسیده حمد کن خدا
subcodes.subjects: @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @predictions and prophecies, @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @Declaration of Baha'u'llah
